feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 採購文件報表的淨訂購值顯示為0
entry.content:
Hi all,

在公有雲版本裡使用「按科目指派顯示採購文件」APP，輸入 WBS 元素作為篩選條件進入報表後，發現「淨訂購值」欄位皆顯示為 0 的情況(如下圖)

但若點選功能表列的「基本清單」，ALV 報表則可正常顯示淨訂購值。

另外，「按供應商顯示採購文件」APP 也同樣有淨訂購值為 0 的問題。

請問淨訂購值為何呈現為0呢? 是否有辦法可以同時看到 WBS 元素和完整顯示的淨訂購值，謝謝

entry.title: Able to revoke the Service Entry Sheet even though the Credit Memo is not approved yet
entry.content:
Need your advise/confirmation if it is the right expected behavior to revoke SES to edit the quantity.

During the approval process the Credit Memo can be rejected or deleted, but already revoked SES - doesn't seem right.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Service groups of MDI Product does not appear in /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am doing setup instructions for MDI using that https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/d761beaeedd949c18213f449f4617250/32afd67be8dc4e66890171e9924098f6.html?locale=en-US&q=master+data+integration. 
In our scenario we are trying to do replicate product master data S/4HANA to Public Cloud system. So I want to prepare our S/4HANA system as provider. On "Publish OData V4 Service Groups" part there are some services and service groups for MDO and MDI. When I opened the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode, left side of the screen shows us published service groups. I did not see any of the service groups. Then I think I need to publish them. I pressed "Publish Service Groups" button and searched as follows. 

I came across the following pop-up.

Is there anything to do for seeing that service groups in the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN tcode. Or is there a step I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

entry.title: Missing Business Context "Appl Interface WBSElement Details (PS_WBSELEMENT)" in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We had a requirement to extend standard cds view I_WBSElementData_2 .

For that i have explored the details about this cds in api.sap.com and got to know we can extend this cds using custom field, with business context "Appl Interface WBSElement Details (PS_WBSELEMENT)" .

But I am not getting above business context in my "custom field" app. Sharing the screenshots for reference.

Do we have any other ways to extend this cds view. Please let me know your view on this?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Automatic sending of SalesOrder messages from the S/4 HANA Public Cloud to SAP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When a new SalesOrder message is created or updated in the S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I would like this message to be automatically triggered in the SAP Event Mesh and stored in the salesorder queue of the SAP Event Mash. I have already stored an “event mesh” system with the corresponding host and outbound communication (OAuth 2.0 via clientID and clientsecret from the event mesh) in the S/4 HANA Public Cloud under Communication Systems. I have created a sales order queue directly in the event mesh under the corresponding message client and stored the topic “sap/s4/beh/salesorder/created/v1”. What steps still need to be taken explicitly in the S/4 HANA Public Cloud so that the sales orders are automatically sent to the queue?

In general, I later retrieve the contents of the queue from the cloud integration via an AMQP adapter and then the other SalesOrder information using an OData call.

Thanks in advance and best regards

Michael Seydler

entry.title: How to start a career as a SAP Functional Consultant?
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAP community.

I just finished my master's degree in business and product management. During my studies, I found a keen interest in SAP, specially in S/4HANA.

Because of this, I am aspiring on becoming a functional consultant. To do so, I currently find myself doing the learning journey " Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA", plus an institutional overview course on SAP S/4HANA. My goal is to take the SAP Certified Associate - Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA.

Does this certificate covers the requirements to start a career as a functional business processes consultant in SAP S/4HANA? What else should I consider to start my career as a SAP S/4HANA consultant?

I appreciate in advance the support and guidance you may provide.

Best regards,

Erick Dos Santos.

entry.title: S/4Hana test & demo cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

 

we are an SAP partner developing add-ons for the Sales and Service Cloud.

 

Recently, we have received requests for integration with S/4Hana. Therefore, we would like to purchase an S/4Hana cloud environment to test our developments. I am struggling now with what license/material to purchase for this. Was anybody in a similar situation?

 

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: Creating Inbound Invoices for STOs - invoice not created
entry.content:
Hello All, 

We are trying to set up STO process for India with inbound GST invoice. 
We followed the below steps:

  1. Open the Create Inbound Invoices for STO app.
  2. In the Organization Details tab, enter the company code, the sending plant, the receiving plant, and the outbound invoice type.
  3. In the Create/Display tab, choose whether you want to create a GST invoice or display an invoice.
  4. In the Selection tab, choose whether you want to create a GST invoice or a stock transfer order.
  5. In the Option tab, enter the creation date and the number of entries.
  6. Choose Execute.
  7. Select Create Inbound GST Invoice.
However, after clicking on the "Create Inbound GST Invoice" button, nothing happens. 
No invoice is created, there is no error log, message or warning. 
 
Please help to understand if there is any configuration to be made to enable inbound GST invoice creation. 
 
Thanks!
 
Best Regards,
Madhuri

entry.title: Problems finding fiori apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi, I’m having trouble finding certain Fiori apps. For example, in the case of the app 'Maintenance Planning Overview,' it appears as available for the 2502 version of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

I have the corresponding Business Role assigned (BR_MAINTENANCE_PLANNER, copied from the standard SAP_BR_MAINTENANCE_PLANNER). Even with all this, I still can't find the Fiori app. 

What stands out to me is that the catalog corresponding to this app (SAP_EAM_BC_ORD_MC) is not included within the SAP_BR_MAINTENANCE_PLANNER role, and I also can't add it manually since no results appear when I search for it.

I am currently working with the scope items 4HI, 4HH, 4VT, and 4WM.

Any idea why I can't find the app?

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Mass Update or Mass Delete of Object Dependencies for Variant Configuration in S4HC?
entry.content:
Need to mass update or Mass delete for Object dependencies of variant configuration, Because Object dependencies are loaded as Classic in processing mode. Need to update processing mode as Advance variant configuration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is It Standard Behavior for Zero-Quantity Lines to Appear After Batch Split in Outbound Delivery?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have encountered a situation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (with EWM) where, after a batch split occurs in an outbound delivery, the original item line remains in the document but with a zero quantity. This happens when:

  • The original item is batch-managed.

  • The system performs automatic batch determination.

  • Multiple batches are assigned to fulfill the total quantity, or a quantity reduction occurs in the delivery

Issue Observed:

  • The system creates additional batch split lines (with quantities assigned to each batch).

  • However, the original item line remains in the outbound delivery with quantity = 0.

  • This zero-quantity line is then visible in both the delivery document and subsequent billing documents.

Why is this a problem?:

Our customers do not accept documents that show zero-quantity lines, and we cannot remove these lines from EDI delivery notes and billing documents sent to them. We use SAP's API for EDI communication and removal of lines is apparently not possible.

Example from the system:

 

 

 

Questions:

  1. Is this an expected standard SAP behavior?

  2. If so, what is the reason for keeping the zero-quantity line in the outbound delivery?

  3. Is there any configuration or workaround to prevent this from happening?

We appreciate any insights from those who have experience with batch determination and batch splits in SAP EWM.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP On Premise EWM System Connection is needed for 2VK Scope Item Implementation
entry.content:
According to the Set up instructions in the SAP EWM Integration - Outbound Processing to Customer (2VK) Scope Item, the information of the SAP EWM On Premise system connection is needed in order to connect it to the SAP S/4Hana Cloud Tenant .

How do we connect SAP S/4Hana Tenant to the SAP EWM On Premise system? What are the necessary connection details?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Subject: How to Register Memo-like Items in Sales BOM (BOM Usage: 5 - Sales Management)
entry.content: I'm currently working in the SD module, where we're using BOM Update (Version 2) to register set products with BOM Usage: 5 (Sales Management). We've received a request to register certain BOM components that serve as text-based memo items (not related to inventory or pricing). While the "Text Item (T)" BOM detail category seems to fit this requirement, these items don't appear in sales orders when configured. Could you advise if there's a method to register memo-like text items in sales BOMs? Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Renaming Non-Stock BOM Components in Sales BOM (Usage:5) – Text Fields Not Propagating to Orders
entry.content: In the SD module, we use BOM Update (Version 2) to maintain set products with BOM Usage: 5 (Sales Management). There’s a requirement to modify the component names of non-stock items within the BOM structure. (Example: A component is normally named "Hose A" in the master data but needs to display as "Hose B" within the set product.) We noticed the BOM details include fields like "Detail Text" (明細テキスト) and "Detail Text 2" (明細テキスト2). However, even after populating these fields, sales orders still show the original material name. Questions: 1.Are these text fields incompatible with BOM Usage 5 (Sales Management)? 2.Is there an additional configuration needed to ensure the custom names appear in sales documents?

entry.title: How to call a API in BADI implementation in HANA Cloud Public edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need to check if we can call Supplier confirmation API in a BADI implementation. We need to read the supplier confirmation data in the implemented BADI while Workflow triggers.

If possible, Kindly provide the sample code if any.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Purchase Order Adobe Form
entry.content:
Dear All

We have a requirement to show Tax details by using Tax Code available at line item within Purchase Order but Tax Code is not mapped within Odata Services used in Adobe Form.

FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_GLO_MENA_SRV
FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV

Any idea how to include remaining standard fields within standard Odata Services or any option to create a custom Odata Service by copying the standard one.

entry.title: Issue while configuring the API Finance - Cash Management Outbound Integration (SAP_COM_0285)
entry.content:
How to define Main Filters for Cash Flow Replication


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: In SAP Public Cloud, how to update the currency for cost and budget, which currency should be used?
entry.content:
Dear Community,
In the Import Financial Plan Data app when I want to upload a budget or plant cost using two different currencies eg.: CHF-EUR, the exchange rate is wrong (we get 3500 CHF/3021,57 EUR, that should be 3668,35 EUR)
I tried to modify the exchange rate in the Import foreign rates  app to update the exchange rates, however, this modifications doesn't show in the Import Financial Plan Data app, amounts remain the same.

Financial data plan app might derive the exchange rates from another table.

I also tried to modify the exchange rate type in Central Business Configuration, Maintain category for planning section, exchange rate type from P to M, however, the system doesn't let me to change it.

Any insights or suggestions from your experiences would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Sales rebate processing - condition contract pricing
entry.content:
Hi all,

we need to have additional condition types in sales condition contracts, so those were created and customized but they are not visible when creating a condition contract. 

The pricing procedure is customized and also assigned to sales contract type 0S01, the condition table only contains the field "condition contract number" so there is no link to the condition types. Why are the new condition types not available when creating a condition contract?

Thanks and best regards

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud -Master Form Template changes not showing up in the related Content Forms
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (TEST) - The updates and changes I've made in my Master Form Templates continuously are not showing up in the related content forms. 

 

For example, our company created a customer master form during original implementation that had no footer. No this is something we very much want to utilize. I identified the correct master form, downloaded it, updated it in Adobe LiveCycle, uploaded it. My assumption is now when I download the related content form it should should display this footer but it doesn't. Am i missing something? perhaps there is an additional step?

Similarly, we don't want any "Test Copy" watermarks in any of our forms in any situation. So I updated several master forms to delete the watermark object and binding. I than did the same process as above, but again none of the content forms show these changes. 

Please help! We really want to bring these changes into production. 

Thank you!
